description: A graphic styled as a New York Times headline. Below the masthead, black serif text reads 'Trump Shares Video of Graphic Attack and Rails Against Haitians', with the words 'Attack' and 'Haitians' struck through in red and replaced with red capitalized words 'MURDER' and 'CRIMINAL ILLEGAL MONSTER', producing an edited version of the headline.
notable_text: The New York Times; Trump Shares Video of Graphic Attack and Rails Against Haitians; MURDER; CRIMINAL ILLEGAL MONSTER
